5.0 out of 5 stars Excellent product, works as described Verified Purchase Reviewed in India on 10 December 2024
This product completely exceeded my expectations. I've been using it for three months now and it holds up perfectly. The build quality is solid, the instructions were clear, and it does exactly what it promises. Would highly recommend to anyone looking for a reliable option.

5.0 out of 5 stars Great! Reviewed in India on 5 January 2025
The media could not be loaded.
2.0 out of 5 stars Disappointing after 2 months of use Verified Purchase Reviewed in India on 15 November 2024
Initially seemed great but problems started appearing after about 6 weeks. The material began showing wear far earlier than I'd expect for the price point. I reached out to the seller about the issue and they offered a partial refund which was appreciated, but the underlying quality issue remains. If you need something for occasional light use it might hold up, but for regular daily use you may be disappointed. I wanted to give this a fair shake before reviewing which is why I waited. The concept is good but the execution needs work.
47 people found this helpful
1.0 out of 5 stars Broke after one week Verified Purchase Reviewed in India on 1 February 2025
Stopped working completely after 7 days. Returning immediately. Complete waste of money.
12 people found this helpful
4.0 out of 5 stars Solid choice, minor quibbles Verified Purchase Reviewed in India on 3 October 2024
Generally very happy with this purchase. Functionally excellent. Only minor finish issues at this price point.
